analysis: EUR/USD is pushing up on the 4-hour, 45% conviction. But the Daily bias is against it — no trade until they line up. Volatility is quiet — coiled and choppy. Nearest structure: ceiling (2.0 pips away). A soft dollar (-0.05% DXY) is a tailwind for the read.
